text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While doing some shopping at the mall on my day
off, I spot Oguri Cap and Tamamo Cross having a
look around.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Are you two doing some shopping together?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, sure are. But it's no ordinary shoppin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We're takin' a trip down memory lane! C'mon,
Oguri, spill the beans!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Growwwl.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...'Ey! All that tells us is how hungry ya are!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Guess I gotta explain it myself.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, there's a Kansai food fair goin' on, so
us two're gonna check it out together!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
What she said. So, you'll have to excuse us. Our
okonomiyaki awaits.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, not so fast! What am I, your spokesperson?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, stop! Don't charge on ahead! You're
gonna get lost again, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The two of them leave in a hurry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A short while later...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... This fair is farther than I thought. It feels
like we've been walking for miles.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. We meet again. What a coincidence,
given how big this mall is.
choice_data_list: Have you and Tamamo Cross gotten separated?
Have you and Tamamo Cross gotten separated?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama? No, she's... Wait. Tama?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Could this mean... Tama's gotten lost?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
She might be feeling lonely. Quick, we have to
find her!
choice_data_list: Why don't we try heading to the food fair?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we'll definitely find her that way. Let's
hurry.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, have you seen an Umamusume with a
Kansai accent?

text_block_list.name: Store Clerk A
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I can't say that rings any bells.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Are you sure? She's about as fast as I am.

text_block_list.name: Store Clerk A
text_block_list.text:
Um... I can't really tell how fast someone is just
standing here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right. Well, let me know if you see anyone
like that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I can't find her anywhere. I wonder where
she could have gone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grumble.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Argh... All this rushing around is making me
hungry...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wuzzat what I think it was?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I knew it! This's why I told ya not ta go on ahead!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama, there you are! I'm so glad you're safe.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Although... It turns out you're the one who found
me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We got your ear-splittin' stomach rumblin' to
thank for that. So long's you're hungry, I could
track ya down in an instant.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? I guess an empty stomach isn't
always a bad thing.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, don't go lookin' all smug now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
All right. We're back together and I'm hungry.
Time for that okonomiyaki.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Do you want to join us, Trainer? I'm sure it'd be
fun for the three of us to eat together.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Always on your own terms, am I right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I won't argue, though. I'm starvin' after all that
walkin' around!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, the three of us eat okonomiyaki
together.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Good point. Maybe she's gone on ahead.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But that's where we were heading in the first
place. And I still haven't made it there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Things could get problematic if I leave Oguri Cap
on her own. I decide to take her to the food fair.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Phew... That's a relief. Look, Tama's over there.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh there ya are! Wait, why's your trainer here
too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that Oguri Cap had been walking around
in circles, so I decided to bring her here myself.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's my fault for takin' my eyes off ya. I dunno how anyone can get lost so quick, but still.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Don't blame yourself. Everyone gets lost every
now and then.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, as long as you're safe, that's what
matters. I'm here for you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, you're da one who went missin', not me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her sharp retort echoes throughout the whole
Kansai food fair.
